2604.14790.title: Diffusion Crossover: Defining Evolutionary Recombination in Diffusion Models via Noise Sequence Interpolation
2604.14790.paper_summary: Interactive Evolutionary Computation (IEC) provides a powerful framework for optimizing subjective criteria such as human preferences and aesthetics, yet it suffers from a fundamental limitation: in high-dimensional generative representations, defining crossover in a semantically consistent manner is difficult, often leading to a mutation-dominated search. In this work, we explicitly define crossover in diffusion models. We propose Diffusion crossover, which formulates evolutionary recombination as step-wise interpolation of noise sequences in the reverse process of Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs). By applying spherical linear interpolation (Slerp) to the noise sequences associated with selected parent images, the proposed method generates offspring that inherit characteristics from both parents while preserving the geometric structure of the diffusion process. Furthermore, controlling the time-step range of interpolation enables a principled trade-off between diversity (exploration) and convergence (exploitation). Experimental results using PCA analysis and perceptual similarity metrics (LPIPS) demonstrate that Diffusion crossover produces perceptually smooth and semantically consistent transitions between parent images. Qualitative interactive evolution experiments further confirm that the proposed method effectively supports human-in-the-loop image exploration. These findings suggest a new perspective: diffusion models are not only powerful generators, but also structured evolutionary search spaces in which recombination can be explicitly defined and controlled.
2604.14790.paper_summary_zh: 互動式進化計算（IEC）提供了一個強大的框架，用於優化主觀標準，如人類偏好和美學，但它存在一個根本性的限制：在高維生成表示中，以語義一致的方式定義交叉是困難的，這通常導致以突變為主導的搜索。在這項工作中，我們明確地在擴散模型中定義交叉。我們提出了擴散交叉，將進化重組公式化為在去噪擴散概率模型（DDPMs）的反向過程中對噪聲序列的逐步插值。通過對與選定父圖像相關的噪聲序列應用球面線性插值（Slerp），所提出的方法生成的後代從兩個父母那裡繼承特徵，同時保留擴散過程的幾何結構。此外，控制插值的時間步範圍使得在多樣性（探索）和收斂（開發）之間實現原則性的權衡。使用PCA分析和感知相似性度量（LPIPS）的實驗結果顯示，擴散交叉產生了在父圖像之間感知上平滑且語義上一致的過渡。定性互動進化實驗進一步證實了所提出的方法有效支持人類在循環中的圖像探索。這些發現提出了一個新的視角：擴散模型不僅是強大的生成器，還是結構化的進化搜索空間，在這裡重組可以被明確定義和控制。
2604.14790.author: Chisatao Kumada et.al.
2604.14790.authors: Chisatao Kumada, Satoru Hiwa, Tomoyuki Hiroyasu
